response.overview: In North Horr, in northwest Kenya, Hervé Barmasse—a mountaineer and communicator—traverses a land where the climate crisis and water scarcity are reshaping every balance. The journey recounts the lives of pastoral communities, the vital bond with their animals, and an increasingly fragile environment, where human health and survival are challenged daily. A real and authentic perspective, it also becomes an act of giving back to these arid lands and the people who inhabit them, where Amref Health Africa works every day to bring health and hope.
response.title: Barren Lands
